english translation text: Dua Makarimul Akhlaq
In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
cause my faith to reach the most perfect faith,
make my certainty the most excellent certainty,

arabic text: و انتَهِ بِنِيَّتِي إلَى أَحْسَنِ النِّيَّـاتِ،
english translation text: and take my intention to the best of intentions
and my works to the best of works!
O God, complete my intention through Your gentleness,
rectify my certainty through what is with You,
and set right what is corrupt in me through Your power!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
spare me the concerns which distract me,
employ me in that about which You wilt ask me tomorrow,
and let me pass my days in that for which You hast created me!
Free me from need, expand Your provision toward me,

arabic text: وَلاَ تَفْتِنِّي بِالبَطَرِ، وَأَعِزَّنِي، وَلا تَبْتَلِيَنِّي بِالْكِبْرِ،
english translation text: and tempt me not with ingratitude! Exalt me and afflict me not with pride!

arabic text: وَعَبِّدْنِي لَكَ وَلاَ تُفْسِدْ عِبَادَتِي بِالْعُجْبِ،
english translation text: Make me worship You and corrupt not my worship with self-admiration!

arabic text: وَأَجْرِ لِلنَّاسِ عَلَى يَدَيَّ الْخَيْرَ، وَلا تَمْحَقْهُ بِالْمَنِّ،
english translation text: Let good flow out from my hands upon the people and efface it not by my making them feel obliged!

arabic text: وَهَبْ لِي مَعَالِيَ الأَخْلاَقِ، وَاعْصِمْنِي مِنَ الْفَخْرِ
english translation text: Give me the highest moral traits and preserve me from vainglory!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
raise me not a single degree before the people
without lowering me its like in myself
and bring about no outward exaltation for me

arabic text: إلاّ أَحْدَثْتَ لِي ذِلَّةً بَاطِنَةً عِنْدَ نَفْسِي بِقَدَرِهَا
english translation text: without an inward abasement in myself to the same measure!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد،
english translation text: O God, bless Muhammad and Muhammad's Household,

arabic text: وَمَتِّعْنِي بِهُدىً صَالِح لا أَسْتَبْدِلُ بِهِ،
english translation text: give me to enjoy a sound guidance which I seek not to replace,
a path of truth from which I swerve not,
and an intention of right conduct in which I have no doubts!

arabic text: وَعَمِّرْنِي مَا كَانَ عُمْرِيْ بِذْلَةً فِي طَاعَتِكَ،
english translation text: Let me live as long as my life is a free gift in obeying You,
but if my life should become a pasture for Satan,

arabic text: فَـاقْبِضْنِي إلَيْـكَ قَبْـلَ أَنْ يَسْبِقَ مَقْتُـكَ إلَيَّ،
english translation text: seize me to Thyself before Your hatred overtakes me
or Your wrath against me becomes firm!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ لا تَدَعْ خَصْلَةً تُعَابُ مِنِّي إلاّ أَصْلَحْتَهَا،
english translation text: O God, deposit in me no quality for which I will be faulted, unless You set it right,

arabic text: وَلا عَآئِبَةً أُؤَنَّبُ بِهَا إلاّ حَسَّنْتَهَا،
english translation text: no flaw for which I will be blamed, unless You make it beautiful,

arabic text: وَلاَ أُكْرُومَـةً فِيَّ نَاقِصَةً إلاّ أَتْمَمْتَهَا
english translation text: no deficient noble trait, unless You complete it!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O God, bless Muhammad and Muhammad's Household

arabic text: وَأَبْدِلْنِي مِنْ بِغْضَةِ أَهْلِ الشَّنَئانِ الْمَحَبَّةَ
english translation text: and replace for me the animosity of the people of hatred with love,
the envy of the people of insolence with affection,
the suspicion of the people of righteousness with trust,
the enmity of those close with friendship,
the disrespect of womb relatives with devotion,
the abandonment of relatives with help,
the attachment of flatterers with love set right,
the rejection of fellows with generous friendliness,

arabic text: وَمِنْ مَرَارَةِ خَوْفِ الظَّالِمِينَ حَلاَوَةَ الأَمَنَةِ
english translation text: and the bitterness of the fear of wrongdoers with the sweetness of security!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْ لِيْ يَداً عَلَى مَنْ ظَلَمَنِي
english translation text: appoint for me a hand against him who wrongs me,
a tongue against him who disputes with me,
and a victory over him who stubbornly resists me!

arabic text: وَهَبْ لِي مَكْراً عَلَى مَنْ كَايَدَنِي
english translation text: Give me guile against him who schemes against me,
power over him who oppresses me,
refutation of him who reviles me,
and safety from him who threatens me!
Grant me success to obey him who points me straight
and follow him who guides me right!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: وَسَدِّدْنِي لَاِنْ أعَـارِضَ مَنْ غَشَّنِي بِالنُّصْـحِ،
english translation text: and point me straight to resist him who is dishonest toward me with good counsel,

arabic text: وَأَجْـزِيَ مَنْ هَجَرَنِي بِالْبِرِّ وَأُثِيبَ مَنْ حَرَمَنِي بِالْبَذْلِ
english translation text: repay him who separates from me with gentle devotion, reward him who deprives me with free giving,
recompense him who cuts me off with joining,

arabic text: وأُخَـالِفَ مَنِ اغْتَابَنِي إلَى حُسْنِ الذِّكْرِ،
english translation text: oppose him who slanders me with excellent mention,

arabic text: وَأَنْ أَشْكرَ الْحَسَنَةَ وَاُغْضِيَ عَنِ السَّيِّئَـةِ
english translation text: give thanks for good, and shut my eyes to evil!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
adorn me with the adornment of the righteous,

arabic text: وَأَلْبِسْنِي زِينَةَ المُتَّقِينَ فِيْ بَسْطِ الْعَدْلِ
english translation text: and clothe me in the ornaments of the god fearing, through spreading justice,

arabic text: وَكَظْمِ الْغَيْظِ وَإطْفَاءِ النَّائِرَةِ وَضَمِّ أَهْلِ الْفُرْقَةِ
english translation text: restraining rage, quenching the flame of hate, bringing together the people of separation,
correcting discord, spreading about good behaviour,
covering faults, mildness of temper,
lowering the wing, beauty of conduct,
gravity of bearing, agreeableness in comportment,

arabic text: وَالسَّبْقِ إلَى الْفَضِيلَةِ، وإيْثَارِ التَّفَضُّلِ و تَركِ التَّعييرِ،
english translation text: precedence in reaching excellence, preferring bounteousness, refraining from condemnation,

arabic text: وَالإفْضَالِ عَلَى غَيْرِ الْمُسْتَحِقِّ وَالـقَوْلِ بِالْحَقِّ وَإنْ عَـزَّ
english translation text: bestowing bounty on the undeserving, speaking the truth, though it be painful,

arabic text: وَاسْتِقْلاَلِ الخَيْـرِ وَإنْ كَثُـرَ مِنْ قَـوْلِي وَفِعْلِي،
english translation text: making little of the good in my words and deeds, though it be much,

arabic text: وَاسْتِكْثَارِ الشَّرِّ وَإنْ قَلَّ مِنْ قَوْلِي وَفِعْلِي،
english translation text: and making much of the evil in my words and deeds, though it be little!

arabic text: وَأكْمِلْ ذَلِكَ لِي بِدَوَامِ الطَّاعَةِ وَلُزُومِ الْجَمَاعَةِ
english translation text: Perfect this for me through lasting obedience, holding fast to the community,

arabic text: وَرَفْضِ أَهْلِ الْبِدَعِ وَمُسْتَعْمِلِ الرَّأي الْمُخْتَرَعِ
english translation text: and rejecting the people of innovation and those who act in accordance with original opinions!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْ أَوْسَعَ رِزْقِكَ عَلَيَّ إذَا كَبُرتُ،
english translation text: appoint for me Your widest provision in my old age
and Your strongest strength when I am exhausted,
try me not with laziness in Your worship,

arabic text: وَلا الْعَمَى عَنْ سَبِيلِكَ وَلاَ بِالتَّعَرُّضِ لِخِلاَفِ مَحَبَّتِكَ،
english translation text: blindness toward Your path, undertaking what opposes Your love,
joining with him who has separated himself from You,
and separating from him who has joined himself to You!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي أصُوْلُ بِكَ عِنْدَ الضَّرُورَةِ وَأَسْأَلُكَ عِنْدَ الْحَاجَةِ،
english translation text: O God, make me leap to You in times of distress, ask from You in needs,
and plead to You in misery!

arabic text: وَلا تَفْتِنّي بِالاسْتِعَانَةِ بِغَيْرِكَ إذَا اضْطُرِرْتُ،
english translation text: Tempt me not to seek help from other than You when I am distressed,

arabic text: وَلا بِالْخُضُوعِ لِسُؤالِ غَيْرِكَ إذَا افْتَقَـرْتُ،
english translation text: to humble myself in asking from someone else when I am poor,

arabic text: وَلاَ بِـالتَّضَـرُّعِ إلَى مَنْ دُونَـكَ إذَا رَهِبْتُ
english translation text: or to plead with someone less than You when I fear,
for then I would deserve Your abandonment,
Your withholding, and Your turning away, O Most Merciful of the merciful!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ مَا يُلْقِي الشَّيْطَانُ فِي رَوْعِي مِنَ التَّمَنِّي وَالتَّظَنِّي وَالْحَسَـدِ
english translation text: O God, make the wishing, the doubt, and the envy which Satan throws into my heart
a remembrance of Your mightiness,
a reflection upon Your power,
and a devising against Your enemy!

arabic text: وَمَا أَجْرَى عَلَى لِسَانِي مِنْ لَفْظَةِ فُحْش أَوْ هُجْر
english translation text: Make everything he causes to pass over my tongue, - the indecent or ugly words,

arabic text: أَوْ شَتْمِ عِرْض أَوْ شَهَادَةِ بَاطِل
english translation text: the maligning of good repute, the false witness,

arabic text: أو اغْتِيَابِ مُؤْمِن غَائِبِ أَوْ سَبِّ حَاضِر،
english translation text: the speaking ill of an absent man of faith or the reviling of one present,

arabic text: وَمَا أَشْبَهَ ذَلِكَ نُطْقاً بِالْحَمْدِ لَكَ
english translation text: and all things similar - a speech in praise of You,
a pursuit of eulogizing You,
an excursion in magnifying You,
a thanksgiving for Your favour,
an acknowledgement of Your beneficence,
and an enumeration of Your kindnesses!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَلاَ اُظْلَمَنَّ وَأَنْتَ مُطِيقٌ لِلدَّفْعِ عَنِّي،
english translation text: let me not be wronged while You canst repel from me,

arabic text: وَلا أَظْلِمَنَّ وَأَنْتَ القَادِرُ عَلَى الْقَبْضِ مِنِّي،
english translation text: let me not do wrong while You art powerful over holding me back,
let me not be misguided while You art able to guide me,
let me not be poor while with You is my plenty,
let me not be insolent while from You comes my wealth!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ إلَى مَغْفِرَتِكَ وَفَدْتُ، وَإلَى عَفْوِكَ قَصَـدْتُ،
english translation text: O God, I come to Your forgiveness, I go straight to Your pardon,
I yearn for Your forbearance, and I trust in Your bounty,

arabic text: وَلَيْسَ عِنْدِي مَا يُوجِبُ لِي مَغْفِرَتَكَ،
english translation text: but there is nothing with me to make me warrant Your forgiveness,

arabic text: وَلاَ فِي عَمَلِي مَا أَسْتَحِقُّ بِهِ عَفْوَكَ،
english translation text: nothing in my works to make me merit Your pardon,

arabic text: وَمَا لِي بَعْدَ أَنْ حَكَمْتُ عَلَى نَفْسِي إلاَّ فَضْلُكَ،
english translation text: and nothing on my behalf after I judge my soul but Your bounty,
so bless Muhammad and his Household
and bestow Your bounty upon me!
O God, make my speech be guidance,

arabic text: وَأَلْهِمْنِي ألتَّقْـوَى وَوَفِّقْنِي لِلَّتِيْ هِيَ أَزْكَى
english translation text: inspire me with reverential fear, give me success in that which is most pure,
and employ me in what is most pleasing to You!
O God, let me tread the most exemplary path
and make me live and die in Your creed!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَمَتِّعْنِي بِالاقْتِصَادِ، وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَهْلِ السَّدَادِ،
english translation text: give me to enjoy moderation, make me into one of the people of right behaviour,

arabic text: وَمِنْ أَدِلَّةِ الرَّشَادِ، وَمِنْ صَالِحِي الْعِبَادِ،
english translation text: the proofs of right conduct, and the servants of righteousness,
and provide me with triumph at the place of Return and safety from the Ambush!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ خُذْ لِنَفْسِكَ مِنْ نَفْسِي مَـا يُخَلِّصُهَا،
english translation text: O God, take to Thyself from my soul what will purify it

arabic text: وَأَبْق لِنَفْسِي مِنْ نَفْسِي مَـا يُصْلِحُهَا
english translation text: and leave for my soul that of my soul that will set it right,
for my soul will perish unless You preserve it!
O God, You art my stores when I sorrow,
You art my recourse when I am deprived,
from You I seek aid when troubled

arabic text: وَعِنْدَكَ مِمَّا فَاتَ خَلَفٌ، وَلِمَا فَسَدَ صَلاَحٌ،
english translation text: and with You is a substitute for everything gone by, a correction for everything corrupted,
and a change from everything You disapprove.

arabic text: فَامْنُنْ عَلَيَّ قَبْلَ الْبَلاءِ بِالْعَافِيَةِ، وَقَبْلَ الطَّلَبِ بِالْجِدةِ،
english translation text: So show kindness to me with well-being before affliction, wealth before asking,

arabic text: وَقَبْلَ الضَّلاَلِ بِالرَّشَادِ، وَاكْفِنِي مَؤُونَةَ مَعَرَّةِ الْعِبَادِ،
english translation text: right conduct before misguidance; suffice me against the burden of shame toward the servants,

arabic text: وَهَبْ لِيْ أَمْنَ يَوْمِ الْمَعَادِ، وَامْنَحنِي حُسْنَ الارْشَادِ
english translation text: give me security on the Day of Return, and grant me excellent right guidance!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
repel from me through Your gentleness, feed me through Your favour,
set me right through Your generosity, heal me through Your benefaction,
shade me in Your shelter, wrap me in Your good pleasure,

arabic text: وَوَفِّقنِي إذَا اشْتَكَلَتْ عَلَيَّ الأمُـورُ لأِهْدَاهَـا،
english translation text: and give me success to reach the most guided of affairs when affairs confuse me,
the purest of works when works seem similar,
and the most pleasing to You of creeds when creeds conflict!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
crown me with sufficiency, place in me excellent guardianship,

arabic text: وَهَبْ لِيْ صِدْقَ الْهِدَايَةِ، وَلا تَفْتِنِّي بِالسَّعَةِ،
english translation text: give me to guide correctly, tempt me not with plenty,

arabic text: وَامْنَحْنِي حُسْنَ الدَّعَةِ، وَلا تَجْعَلْ عَيْشِي كَدّاً كَدّاً،
english translation text: grant me excellent ease, make not my life toil and trouble,
and refuse not my supplication in rejection,

arabic text: فَإنِّي لا أَجْعَلُ لَكَ ضِدّاً وَلا أَدْعُو مَعَكَ نِدّاً
english translation text: for I make none rival to You and I supplicate none with You as equal!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: وَامْنَعْنِي مِنَ السَّرَفِ وَحَصِّنْ رِزْقِي مِنَ التَّلَفِ،
english translation text: hold me back from prodigality, fortify my provision against ruin,
increase my possessions through blessing them,

arabic text: وَأَصِبْ بِي سَبِيلَ الْهِدَايَةِ لِلْبِرِّ فِيمَا اُنْفِقُ مِنْهُ
english translation text: and set me upon the path of guidance through piety in what I spend!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
spare me the burden of earning,
and provide for me without reckoning,
lest I be distracted from Your worship through seeking
and carry the load of earning's ill results!
O God, bestow upon me what I seek through Your power
and grant me sanctuary from what I fear through Your might!

arabic text: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ وَصُنْ وَجْهِي بِالْيَسَارِ،
english translation text: O God, bless Muhammad and his Household, save my face through ease,

arabic text: وَلاَ تَبْتَذِلْ جَاهِي بِالإقْتارِ فَأَسْتَرْزِقَ أَهْلَ رِزْقِكَ،
english translation text: and demean not my dignity through neediness, lest I seek provision from those whom You hast provided

arabic text: وَأَسْتَعْطِيَ شِرَارَ خَلْقِكَ، فَأفْتَتِنَ بِحَمْدِ مَنْ أَعْطَانِي،
english translation text: and asks for bestowal from the worst of Your creatures! Then I would be tried by praising him who gave to me

arabic text: وَاُبْتَلَى بِـذَمِّ مَنْ مَنَعَنِي وَأَنْتَ مِنْ دُونِهِمْ وَلِيُّ الإعْطَاءِ وَالْمَنْعِ
english translation text: and afflicted with blaming him who held back from me, while You - not they - art patron of giving and holding back.
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household
and provide me with soundness in worship,
detachment in renunciation,

arabic text: وَعِلْماً فِي اسْتِعمَـال، وَوَرَعـاً فِي إجْمَال
english translation text: knowledge put into action, and abstinence in measure!
O God, seal my term with Your pardon,
verify my expectation in hoping for Your mercy,
smooth my paths to reach Your good pleasure,
and make my works good in all my states!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
incite me to remember You in times of heedlessness,
employ me in Your obedience in days of disregard,

arabic text: وَانْهَجْ لِي إلى مَحَبَّتِكَ سَبيلاً سَهْلَةً
english translation text: open a smooth road for me to Your love,

arabic text: أكْمِلْ لِي بِهَا خَيْرَ الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِـرَةِ
english translation text: and complete for me thereby the good of this world and the next
O God, and bless Muhammad and his Household

arabic text: كَأَفْضَلِ مَـا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى أَحَد مِنْ خَلْقِكَ قَبْلَهُ،
english translation text: the best You hast blessed any of Your creatures before him
and wilt bless any of them after him,

arabic text: وَآتِنا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً،
english translation text: and "give to us in this World good, and in the next world good" (2:201),
and protect me through Your mercy "from the chastisement of the Fire" (2:201)!
